subject: MEV Bot Codebase Survey + CEX Intelligence Module Built
body:
CP agent surveyed 5 MEV bot project directories and the vortsghost2025/mev-bot GitHub repo. Found reusable components across codebases. Key findings for kucoin-lane:

1. CEX PROVIDER NOW LIVE: Built src/cex_intelligence/cex_provider.py (Python, zero external deps) using patterns from your kucoin-margin-bot exchange_client.py. It does: KuCoin + Binance public API price fetch, DEX-CEX spread detection, CEX listing checks. Could replace/augment your DataFetcher's CEX price leg.

2. YOUR MARGIN BOT CODE: The exchange_client.py retry decorator (exponential backoff, transient vs critical error separation) and live_data_fetcher.py (OHLCV candles) are directly reusable. The market_regime_analyzer.py has 18 technical features + KMeans clustering — could feed into signal weighting.

3. MEV-BOT-CLEAN: Has full KuCoin exchange client in Node.js (kucoin-exchange.js) with HMAC auth, order placement. Also has arbitrage graph, swap decoder, state predictor, pool watcher. All Node.js/ESM.

4. ALPHA SCANNER UPGRADED: Now combines DEX (40%) + Social (30%) + CEX (30%) with multi-source bonus. Live test shows NINJA token as pre-listing candidate (NOT_LISTED on CEX, trending on DEX with $1.5M vol).

Full survey: reports/mev-bot-codebase-survey.md in CP repo.

No action required — informational only. But if you want to integrate the CEX provider or port the retry decorator, the Python code is ready.

evidence.detail: Full survey of 5 MEV bot projects
Alpha scan confirmed CEX integration working: 20 tokens checked, 14 listed, NINJA identified as pre-listing candidate
